chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-614 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on withdrawal statement as flag “B”. 3. For hearing of main case. ------ 08.05.2025 M/s. Javed Ahmed Soomro and Jam Zuhaib Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ------ At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner draws attention of the Court towards statement dated 06.05.2025 and seeks withdrawal of this petition, which is not opposed by learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
